column1: # Campaign manifest for k6 ai-streaming result batches.
# Format: <result-batch-dir-name>\t<campaign-label> (TSV).
# Lines starting with '#' are comments.
# Manifest entries are AUTHORITATIVE — they override the campaign label
# that the run's k6 handleSummary JSON had baked in at execution time.
# Use this to post-hoc relabel batches that launched with the wrong
# --ai-campaign flag, or to backfill legacy runs that predate the flag.
# 2026-04-28: W0 async-pool=400 cleanup
# The canonical 5-rep async-W0-pool=400 cell is the THIRD batch
# (results_ai_streaming_20260428_023918_VANblx — 5 OK runs in a single
# campaign-tagged batch). The first two batches launched with
# --ai-campaign=headline-5rep-rerun-2026-04-28 but are operationally
# early attempts:
#   _1ApaCj  — single-rep first attempt before the readiness-gate
#              warm-up cadence settled (1 OK run only)
#   _dXSOMo  — 1-CONTAMINATED + 1-OK retry that surfaced the
#              connection-refused signature the readiness gate now
#              guards against (2 runs total, 1 of which the validation
#              sidecar already flags CONTAMINATED)
# Without these manifest entries the canonical campaign reads as
# 8 cells x 5 reps + 1 cell x 7 OK + 1 CONTAMINATED — which is correct
# end-to-end provenance but inconsistent with the manuscript-clean
# "9 cells x 5 reps" claim. Relabel the early attempts to a separate
# campaign so the canonical campaign reads cleanly without losing the
# early-attempt evidence (it lives under early-w0-attempts-2026-04-28
# and remains in the runs.csv with full source-file traceability).
results_ai_streaming_20260428_022029_1ApaCj
results_ai_streaming_20260428_022904_dXSOMo
# 2026-04-28 realism-subset rerun: the initial reactive W2 batch was OOM-killed mid-run
# (TWEET_JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS heap cap missing on stack-switch). Reps survive validation but
# represent contaminated environment; the canonical rerun is in 180846. Relabel here so
# the 180250 batch doesn't pool into the realism-subset-2026-04-28 cell aggregates.
_oom_affected_results_ai_streaming_20260428_180250_UxTzDT
